title: Born Yesterday
writer: Garson Kanin, Albert Mannheimer, Yves Mirande
actors: Judy Holliday, William Holden, Broderick Crawford
plot: While in Washington to lobby for favorable legislation, a garbage tycoon hires a reporter to teach his ex-showgirl mistress proper etiquette to better fit in with high society, but she ends up learning more than he bargained for.
